analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet simply announces/photos a meeting of the Inter-Parliamentary Commission between Russia and China. It is informational and neutral, highlighting a bilateral cooperation event without evaluative language. Evaluation by narrative: RU1 (West immoral/hostile) – not present; no mention of the West or criticism. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system) – potentially relevant when non-Western cooperation is highlighted, but the tweet lacks any framing about multipolarity, alternative order, or sovereignty; it only states that a meeting occurred, so insufficient to claim promotion of RU2. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner) – no claims of peace, solidarity, reliability, or assistance; just photos. RU4 (Russian history admirable) – not referenced. RU5 (Russia at forefront) – no claims of achievements or leadership. RU6 (Interesting culture/nature) – not applicable. Conclusion: No listed narratives are clearly promoted.
